<!-- Describe how you would like this feature to work -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? -->

## Impact
- **User Impact:** (low, medium, high)
- **Technical Complexity:** (low, medium, high)
- **Effort Estimate:** (hours)

## Additional Context

## Checklist
